overall.description: First-person exploration of a Mediterranean-style town in a video game engine, walking along paved roads and paths past orange and yellow stucco buildings under a clear blue sky. The camera moves steadily through empty streets, courtyards, and grassy slopes with no other characters or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved road approaching orange institutional building

events.description: turns right to circle around the orange institutional building

agents.ego_description: walking along paved road toward orange building, then turning right to circle around its perimeter

entered.detail: two-story modern building with orange stucco walls and flat concrete roof
tall evergreen trees casting shadows on the road
asphalt road with gravel shoulders winding through the town
green forested hills visible in the background under blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a paved road lined with pine trees, approaching a modern orange institutional building. The camera turns right to circle around the building, revealing gravel shoulders and maintaining a steady walking pace through the sunlit Mediterranean environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open gravel courtyard between institutional buildings

events.description: exits paved road into open gravel area behind the orange building

agents.ego_description: walking across open gravel courtyard toward cluster of buildings in the town center

entered.detail: low-rise white building with multiple windows and flat roof
open area covered with loose gravel and dirt between structures
single-story beige structure with sloped roof

segments.scene_description: Moving from the paved road into a wide gravel courtyard, the camera passes behind the orange building and approaches a cluster of modern white and beige structures. The ground transitions from asphalt to loose gravel as the exploration continues through the open area.

events.description: moves from gravel courtyard onto grassy terrain
begins ascending paved slope toward upper road

agents.ego_description: walking through grass and then ascending a paved slope past residential buildings, gaining elevation

entered.detail: uncut grassy slope with patches of dirt between buildings
narrow multi-story yellow residential building with balconies
panoramic view of distant town buildings and red rooftops in the valley

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from gravel to grassy terrain, moving between buildings and ascending a slope. A tall yellow residential building comes into view on the left as the elevation increases, revealing a panoramic vista of the distant town in the valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined residential street with distant views

agents.ego_description: walking along paved upper road lined with trees and yellow residential buildings

entered.detail: dense line of trees forming a canopy over the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a paved road at higher elevation, passing the tall yellow building and moving along a tree-lined street. The ground returns to asphalt as the camera continues through the residential area with views of the distant landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a low-lying institutional area into an elevated residential district overlooking a valley. It begins on a paved road lined with pine trees, circling a modern orange building before the camera turns right to move across gravel shoulders. As the ground shifts from asphalt to loose gravel, the camera passes behind the orange structure and navigates a wide courtyard toward a cluster of white and beige buildings. The scene then transitions from gravel to grassy terrain, ascending a slope past a tall yellow residential building as the elevation increases to reveal a panoramic vista of the town below. Finally, the camera returns to a paved, tree-lined street at this higher altitude, continuing through the residential area with the distant landscape visible in the background.
